original_final_question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest average Bonus # in New York's lottery winning numbers? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Compute average Bonus # by year from 2005 to 2010 and select the maximum.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Compute the average Bonus # by year (2005-2010) and select the maximum; the peak year is 2005.
